description_long: This kiosk is a small, ornate stone structure with three distinct sections, each topped with a gray, hipped roof. The central section is larger and features a prominent arched entryway, flanked by two smaller wings with matching arched openings. The exterior is constructed from light-colored stone blocks, with decorative stonework around the arches and subtle cornice detailing along the rooflines. The paved stone base extends outward, providing a small plaza area in front of the kiosk, and there is some greenery visible at one corner. The rear of the kiosk is solid, with no visible openings, and the side wings each have a small, rounded dome at the back. The overall design is classical, with symmetrical proportions and architectural embellishments reminiscent of neoclassical or Beaux-Arts styles.
description: A small, ornate stone kiosk with three arched entryways, gray hipped roofs, and classical architectural detailing, set on a paved base with some greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing three arched entryways, central larger section, and decorative stonework.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the small rounded dome at the rear of the right wing and the solid stone wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid stone back and symmetrical layout of the three sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another rounded dome at the rear of the left wing and some visible greenery.
attribute_door_configuration: three open archways at the front, no visible doors
attribute_roof_design: Three hipped roofs with gray tiling, two small domes at the rear corners, no overhangs or skylights
attribute_architectural_style: Neoclassical with Beaux-Arts influences, featuring symmetrical layout and decorative stonework
